texto: In the finance world, we used to spend all of our time looking backwards, reporting on what happened. Can I book it? What are the numbers? Now it's about looking into the future. It's about planning and integration. The role of finance is now that of a partner in the business.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Safra A. Catz que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “In the finance world, we used to spend all of our time looking backwards, reporting on what happe…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre negocios, business, time, com foco em termino e time.

texto: The most significant barrier to female leadership is the actual lack of females in leadership. The best advice I can give to women is to go out and start something, ideally their own businesses. If you can't see a path for leadership within your own company, go blaze a trail of your own.
explicacao: Citação de Safra A. Catz sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “The most significant barrier to female leadership is the actual lack of females in leadership. Th…” articula lideranca, women, inspiracional em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspiracional.

frase_original: The most significant barrier to female leadership is the actual lack of females in leadership. The best advice I can give to women is to go out and start something, ideally their own businesses. If you can't see a path for leadership within your own company, go blaze a trail of your own.
